subcodes.first_line: This is the Book of God, sent down unto all else, that the servants may hearken unto the Call of their Lord, the Mighty, the All-Bestowing, and recite it [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب الله نزل لما سواه لیسمعن العباد ندآء ربهم العزیز الوهاب و یقرئنه و
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
